prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-TWEEZERSET-4PC-IR-TT Product Type: TWEEZER Brand (from catalog): ToolTreaux Existing Title: ToolTreaux Stainless Steel Precision Tweezer Set Serrated Tips Secure Grip - 4pc Description: The ToolTreaux 4pc traditional tweezer set comes with 4 different tweezers with assorted tips. These standard-sized tweezers are great for grabbing hard-to-reach items and offer a sturdy grip.

Each tweezer features a serrated tip with a tapered blunt designed to securely hold on to tiny objects. You can count on them to grip and place small items during hobby and crafting projects like jewelry making, metalworking, and woodworking.

These tweezers have a non-slip grip that allows for a comfortable, tight pinch. The strong grip will ensure that you can hold on to stubborn objects that smaller tweezers aren't strong enough to hold onto. They are made of durable, high-quality stainless steel that won't rust, and will fit inside most standard toolboxes and craft storage containers. Search Terms: tweezer set guru kit blackhead tick removal tweezers precision jumbo sized stainless steel tools jewelry making kit charms supplies glass beads tools eyeglass repair kit watch repair serrated craft storage supplies sticks materials kits glue Features: - SERRATED TIPS - ToolTreaux 4pc tweezer set features serrated tips with a tapered blunt designed to hold on to hard-to-grab objects. Use them to securely grip and place tiny items used during hobby and craft projects - KNURLED SECURE GRIP - Each tweezer has a non-slip grip that allows for comfortable and tight pinching, ideal for small items. Strong grip helps hold onto stubborn objects - DURABLE CONSTRUCTION - Tweezers are made of high-quality stainless steel that won't rust. Entire lightweight and compact set weighs .15lbs, will fit inside most standard toolboxes and craft storage containers - VERSATILE PRECISION TOOLS - Traditional tweezers are ideal for picking up and positioning objects like stones and gems during jewelry making, but they'll also come in handy for general use purposes like working on electronics, medical and lab work, woodworking, and other fine crafts. Use them to remove splinters and unwanted small hairs - SPECIFICATIONS - Set size: 4pc; Assorted tips; Material: stainless steel; Color: chrome; Grip style: knurled; Ergonomic grip: Tip style: serrated; Weight: .15lbs (2.4oz) === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Max. 250 characters === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ToolTreaux 4-pc Chrome Stainless Steel Precision Tweezers

openai.item_name: ToolTreaux 4-Pk Chrome Stainless Steel Precision Tweezers

anthropic.title_differentiation: Serrated Tips, Knurled Secure Grip, Jewelry Making, Electronics Repair, Splinter Removal
